title: Who May Dwell

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Who may climb the sacred height?
Whose heart can dwell in perfect light?
One whose path stays true and clear
Walking forward without fear

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Truth flows gentle from their tongue
No whispered lies have ever sprung
Standing guard at wisdom's gate
Their neighbor's honor they create

sections.label: Chorus
lines: In righteousness we find our way
Through darkest night and brightest day
With clean hands and a humble heart
We'll never from Your presence part

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: When they speak, their word remains
Through sunshine bright or stormy rains
No silver earned through others' pain
No profit from ill-gotten gain

sections.label: Bridge
lines: The faithful rise on wings of grace
Their foundation shall not be erased
In justice sweet and mercy deep
Their souls the sacred heights will keep

sections.label: Final Chorus
lines: In righteousness we find our way
Through darkest night and brightest day
With clean hands and a humble heart
Forever in Your courts we'll stay

epigraph: who shall abide in thy tabernacle? who shall dwell in thy holy hill?
